Smarter savings · USDC on Base

Earn the yield you're missing.

1–3% a year slips through unclaimed reward tokens. The agent's job is to claim them and rotate when the math works.

why trust it

A yield agent that can say no

How it works
Live checks

Uses today's rates, not stale tables

Trove watches Base USDC pools, reads wallet positions, and returns HOLD / MOVE / HARVEST from current market data.

Check a wallet
Receipts

Every decision leaves a trail

Policy config and decision logs are stored on 0G; the agent identity keeps memory roots and counters on-chain.

View receipts
Automation

Only acts when the math clears

The policy compares extra yield against gas, slippage, and safety margin before recommending a move.

See policy
Control

No hidden custody or lockups

The live app gives verdicts and proof. Fund movement stays behind explicit wallet or execution permissions.

Read limits
Without the agent
−$172/yr

Per $10k supplied, unclaimed Fluid reward tokens silently expire.

With the agent
5.96% APY

Base 4.42% plus 1.72% rewards, auto-claimed and net of gas.
